rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Register endpoint omits firstName/lastName (required:true in Payload Users), causing 500 on every registration in production. Integration tests mask this because they mock payload.create without field","scope":"src/app/api/auth/register/route.ts"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"When mocking payload.create in tests, always validate the fields passed to it, otherwise required-field gaps go undetected until production.","scope":"testing"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Payload CMS collections may have required fields beyond the obvious; always inspect the collection definition before writing create() calls.","scope":"src/server/payload"}]}
